---
title: Patricia Prade
last: Prade
middle: ''
first: Patricia
people_group: extension-faculty
education: Ph.D. | University of Florida <br> M.S. | Regonal University of Blumenau,
  Brazil <br> B.S. | Regonal University of Blumenau, Brazil
subtitle: Extension Educator - Entomologist
blurb: My research and extension interests focus on biological control, integrated
  pest management (IPM), and invasive species, with a broader interest in how agricultural
  systems function across space and time. I am particularly interested in understanding
  how land use change reshapes biodiversity patterns and alters ecosystem functions
  and services within agricultural landscapes.
description: she/her
image: ../_images/prade-patricia.jpg
toc: false
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications.ejs
  contents: ../../publications/**/*.qmd
  sort: pub_number desc
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: Prade, P.
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: ../_images/prade-patricia.jpg
  links:
  - icon: envelope
    text: Email
    href: prade@psu.edu
  - text: ORCID
    href: |
      https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4251-9340
  - text: ResearchGate
    href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Patricia-Prade?ev=hdr_xprf
  - icon: linkedin
    text: LinkedIn
    href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/patricia-prade-ph-d-a2bb6242/
---

<hr>

::: {#about}

{{< meta blurb >}}

## Education

{{< meta education >}}

<br>
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#pubs}
:::
